What's up everybody? Alright so what we got to do is create a new calendar for acuity for this challenge. So for the bring a friend challenge you want to add a new calendar and to do this you have to have the there's three different subscription models you can subscribe to you have to have the middle one to have six calendars I forget what it's called but make sure you get that and you can name this calendar just bring a friend and you can put in your email address a picture if you want in this case we don't really need to if you have more than one location you can add locations but right here you can allow however many point appointments you want during the same time slot so most people shoot for three four so that will double booking and then you can accept appointments until they're fully booked or until a certain amount of appointments depending on how many people we want and that you don't really have to do much with that and these appointments are going to be consultation so once we're done with that click create the calendar and then you set your business hours basically what you want to do here is not set your actual business hours but only the hours you want to be doing consultations for the bring a friend challenge and you can even do availability for specific days and once you do that you have to save the changes and you can basically set it up however you want but once you're done setting up your availability and the appointment types and everything you want to integrate this calendar into click funnels not to do that we have to do is you have to go to client scheduling page and click the embedded scheduler right here copy that go to your click funnels account and then select the bring a friend challenge funnel from there this is going to go in the third step on the thank you page so you want to be right there so you click that and then edit page and loading editor custom JavaScript HTML open the code editor and you just paste that right in there click X save exit that and that's all it takes so couple steps create the calendar integrated into click funnels once you do that you're all set cool
